subject: Continuous Random Variables
topic: §38 The Distribution of a Function of a Random Variable
question: Let $X$ be a random variable with density function $f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{3}{2} x^2 & -1 \le x \le 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$. (a) Find the pdf of $Y = 3X$. (b) Find the pdf of $Z = 3 - X$.
